headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Kinross Gold (TSX:K) After Its 1 Year Surge?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Kinross Gold at around C$43.95 is still offering value after a big run, or if most of the easy gains are behind it. The stock has returned 3.3% over the last 7 days and 13.2% year to date, with a very large 1 year return of 159.7% and a multi year gain that is more than 7x over 3 years and also very large over 5 years. Recent price moves sit against a broader backdrop of ongoing interest in gold producers, as investors reassess how miners fit into...
